Skill: UX CPA Orchestrator
Description: Skill master of Cognitive Product Architecture (CPA). Use for orquestrar analise completa of UX envolvendo cognicao, comportamento, UI, strategy, etica e sustentabilidade. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Coordinate complete UX analysis integrating all specialized skills in the package.  ## Quality Bar
Triggers: ux audit, ux analysis, ux orchestrator, cognitive product architecture, cpa, full ux review
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Diagnostico cognitivo with ux-cognitive-architecture.
- 2. Mapeamento of loop comportamental with ux-behavioral-loop.
- 3. Correcao of sistema visual with ux-visual-systems.
- 4. Plano of experimento with ux-lean-experimentation.
- 5. Gate etico with ux-ethics-bias and gate of sustentabilidade with ux-sustainable-product.
- 6. Narrativa for stakeholders with ux-emotional-stakeholder.
Output Contract:
- Problema sintetizado.
- Diagnostico by camada (cognitiva, visual, comportamental).
- Plano of mudanca priorizado (P0/P1/P2).
- Hypotheses and metrics of validation.
- Riscos eticos and mitigactions.
- Script of comunicacao for stakeholders.
